PETITIONER IN PRO PER. RESPONDENT IN PRO PER. AFTER TESTIMONY BY THE PARTIES, THE COURT RULED THAT MINOR SHALL REMAIN IN RIORDAN HIGH SCHOOL THROUGH THE TWELVE GRADE, AND RECEIVE HIS HIGH SCHOOL DIPLOMA RHS. ADDITIONALLY, THE COURT ENCOURAGED THE PARTIES TO STOP APPLYING UNWARRANTED PRESSURE ON MINOR. COURT SHALL PREPARE THE ORDER AFTER HEARING AND MAIL COPIES OF SAME TO THE PARTIES.
